use_cases: Displaying featured products or services in a swipeable card format
Showcasing portfolio items or case studies with visual navigation
Presenting testimonials or customer reviews in a horizontal carousel
Creating image galleries with card-based layout and smooth transitions
Highlighting featured content across e-commerce and portfolio sites
ai_summary: A card carousel component that displays collections of cards in a horizontally scrollable format with navigation controls. Built with shadcn/ui design patterns using CVA for variant management, featuring clean minimalist styling suitable for showcasing products, testimonials, or portfolio items. Includes auxiliary Badge component for labeling card content.
